groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MATCHING INFORMATION TO CATEGORIES 29

Questions 27 - 30

Choose the correct achievement for each place Humboldt visited.

27 Lake Valencia

28 Mount Chimborazo

29 Cuba

30 Venezuela

A - worked out what caused a particular illnessB - discovered several previously unknown speciesC - advised on how the economy could be developedD - realised that human activities were altering the climateE - confirmed the presence of an unusual geographical featureA - worked out what caused a particular illnessB - discovered several previously unknown speciesC - advised on how the economy could be developedD - realised that human activities were altering the climateE - confirmed the presence of an unusual geographical featureA - worked out what caused a particular illnessB - discovered several previously unknown speciesC - advised on how the economy could be developedD - realised that human activities were altering the climateE - confirmed the presence of an unusual geographical featureA - worked out what caused a particular illnessB - discovered several previously unknown speciesC - advised on how the economy could be developedD - realised that human activities were altering the climateE - confirmed the presence of an unusual geographical feature

options.label: A
options.text: - worked out what caused a particular illness

options.label: C
options.text: - advised on how the economy could be developed

options.label: D
options.text: - realised that human activities were altering the climate

options.label: E
options.text: - confirmed the presence of an unusual geographical feature
